projectDescription: A Vue 3 financial transaction management platform with AES encryption, JWT-based role access control, and dashboards for Operators and Supervisors to process sales, cancellations, and refunds.
keyFeatures: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (Operator / Supervisor)
AES end-to-end encryption for sensitive card data (number, CVV, expiration)
Operator panel for processing sales and querying approved transactions
Supervisor panel for applying cancellations and refunds with justification
Operation history with filtering, search, and Excel export
Dark/light theme toggle throughout the UI
Real-time toast notifications for operation feedback
Card number masking (shows only first 4 and last 4 digits)
publicApiSurface: POST /login — Authenticate user and receive JWT token
POST /venta — Process a new sale (Operator role)
PATCH /cancelacion — Apply a cancellation to a transaction (Supervisor role)
PATCH /devolucion — Apply a refund to a transaction (Supervisor role)
cifrarAES(valor) — Encrypt a value using AES
insertarRegistro(registro) — Insert a new record into local history
exportarJSON() — Export history as a JSON file
